creator: hans@nordhaug.priv.no
text:
- Update to 0.4.2. 

I just submitted a patch for updating to 0.4.1 - see ports/137002.
However, two days after that Piwik 0.4.2 was released so hence this new
patch. I hope miwi can takes this one too. (This time I didn't forget
the distinfo file.)

Port maintainer (wenheping@gmail.com) is cc'd.
